items.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPT Default
items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant becomes ChatGPT's new default, with 50%+ fewer hallucinations and Gmail/memory integration.

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni Released on OCI
items.summary: Open-source multimodal model reasoning across video, audio, images, and text now available on Oracle Cloud.

items.title: OpenAI Unveils Real-Time Voice & Translation Models
items.summary: Three new audio models—GPT-Realtime-2, GPT-Realtime-Translate (70+ languages), and GPT-Realtime-Whisper—launched for agents.

items.title: Four Chinese Labs Release Open-Weight Coding Models
items.summary: GLM-5.1, MiniMax M2.7, Kimi K2.6, and DeepSeek V4 released within 12 days, matching Western frontier at lower cost.

items.title: Meta Unveils Muse Spark Flagship LLM
items.summary: Meta's first proprietary (non-Llama) model, Muse Spark, targets multimodal reasoning and agentic tasks at low compute cost.

items.title: Google Rolls Out 'Help Me Write' Personalized Email Tool
items.summary: Google Workspace's 'Help Me Write' now drafts emails personalized to your tone, pulling context from Drive and Gmail.

items.title: Anthropic Launches 12 Claude Plugins for Legal Work
items.summary: Anthropic released 12 Claude plugins for contract, employment, and litigation law, integrating Thomson Reuters' CoCounsel.

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant Adds Memory Sources & Gmail Context
items.summary: ChatGPT now shows memory sources across all models and can personalize answers using past chats, files, and Gmail.

items.title: Google Hiring Hundreds of Forward-Deployed AI Engineers
items.summary: Google is building a team of forward-deployed engineers, reportedly in the hundreds, to help business customers adopt its AI products.

items.title: JPMorgan Chase Reclassifies AI as Core Infrastructure
items.summary: JPMorgan formalized a $19.8B tech budget with 2,000 AI staff, projecting $2.5B annual value from AI productivity and security.

items.title: Google Announces Android 17 AI Feature Slate
items.summary: Google unveiled major AI features for Android 17 ahead of Apple's expected iOS/Siri AI revamp announcement.

items.title: Pentagon Signs AI Deals with Google, Microsoft, OpenAI & More
items.summary: Pentagon struck AI agreements with 8 tech giants for classified network deployment, notably excluding Anthropic.

items.title: Microsoft, Google, xAI Allow US Gov to Pre-Test AI Models
items.summary: NIST announced Google, Microsoft, and xAI will share unreleased AI models with the government for cybersecurity testing.

items.title: Apple Settles AI False Advertising Lawsuit for Up to $95/User
items.summary: Apple agreed to settle a class action over overstated Apple Intelligence/Siri claims on iPhone 16, paying up to $95 per buyer.

items.title: Anthropic Secures $50B+ in New Capital from Google & Amazon
items.summary: Anthropic raised $40B from Google and $5B from Amazon (with $100B AWS spend commitment), stacking over $50B in fresh capital.
